name: Ziyada Lead Processor — Supabase + Email + Calendar + HubSpot

parameters.jsonOutput:
={
  "full_name": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.full_name || $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.name || '' }}",
  "email": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.email || '' }}",
  "phone": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.phone || '' }}",
  "company": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.company || '' }}",
  "sector": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.sector || $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.industry || '' }}",
  "challenge": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.challenge || '' }}",
  "service_interest": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.service_interest || $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.services_requested || '' }}",
  "meeting_purpose": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.meeting_purpose || '' }}",
  "visitor_need": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.visitor_need || '' }}",
  "booking_intent": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.booking_intent || false }}",
  "source": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.source || 'chat_widget' }}",
  "source_context": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.source_context || '' }}",
  "session_id": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.session_id || '' }}",
  "ip_address": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.ip_address || $('Receive Lead').item.json.headers?.x-forwarded-for || '' }}",
  "utm_source": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.utm_source || '' }}",
  "utm_medium": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.utm_medium || '' }}",
  "utm_campaign": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.utm_campaign || '' }}",
  "utm_term": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.utm_term || '' }}",
  "utm_content": "{{ $('Receive Lead').item.json.body.utm_content || '' }}"
}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "name": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.full_name }}",
  "email": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.email }}",
  "phone": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.phone }}",
  "company": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.company }}",
  "industry": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.sector }}",
  "challenge": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.challenge }}",
  "services_requested": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.service_interest }}",
  "source": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.source }}",
  "source_page": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.source_context }}",
  "meeting_purpose": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.meeting_purpose }}",
  "visitor_need": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.visitor_need }}",
  "ip_address": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.ip_address }}",
  "utm_source": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.utm_source }}",
  "utm_medium": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.utm_medium }}",
  "utm_campaign": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.utm_campaign }}",
  "utm_term": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.utm_term }}",
  "utm_content": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.utm_content }}",
  "status": "new",
  "approval_status": "pending"
}

parameters.subject: =🔔 طلب استشارة جديد (Pending Approval) — {{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.full_name }}
parameters.message:
=

طلب جديد من {{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.source }}

الحالة: Pending Approval

الاسم: {{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.full_name }}

الجوال: {{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.phone }}

الإيميل: {{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.email || '—' }}

الاحتياج: {{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.visitor_need || '—' }}

سبب الاجتماع: {{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.meeting_purpose || '—' }}

UTM: {{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.utm_source || '-' }} / {{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.utm_medium || '-' }} / {{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.utm_campaign || '-' }}

اعتمدوا الحجز يدوياً ثم أرسلوا القرار إلى webhook /booking-approval.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "name": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.full_name }}",
  "email": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.email }}",
  "phone": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.phone }}",
  "company": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.company }}",
  "industry": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.sector }}",
  "services_requested": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.service_interest }}",
  "source": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.source }}",
  "source_page": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.source_context }}",
  "hs_lead_status": "NEW",
  "lifecycle_stage": "subscriber"
}

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "message": "Lead saved as pending approval. Notifications and CRM sync triggered.",
  "supabase_id": "{{ $('Save to Supabase').item.json[0]?.id || 'saved' }}",
  "approval_status": "pending",
  "name": "{{ $('Prepare Data').item.json.full_name }}"
}
={ "success": false, "error": "Missing required fields: full_name and at least one contact field (phone or email) are required" }
